commands.review_summary:
The PR guards agent tool definition metadata reads, converts unreadable parameter schemas into a quarantinable invalid schema sentinel, and adds a regression test.

PR surface: Source +40, Tests +23. Total +63 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, not by executing tests: current main directly reads `tool.parameters` in `toToolDefinitions`, so a throwing getter can abort conversion before quarantine.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because there are no discrete review findings; the remaining work is normal maintainer PR validation.

target.title: fix(agents): guard tool definition schema reads
target.body:
## Summary
- guard agent tool definition metadata reads so a hostile or broken tool schema getter cannot crash definition adaptation
- represent unreadable parameter schemas as an invalid schema sentinel, letting runtime schema inspection quarantine the tool instead of silently making it callable
- add a regression covering an unreadable `parameters` getter through `toToolDefinitions`

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.ts src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.ts src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: agent tool definition adaptation no longer throws when a plugin/tool exposes an unreadable `parameters` schema getter.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source worktree on Node 24.15.0; remote changed-gate proof pending.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tool-definition-adapter.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
Evidence after fix: the regression test builds a tool with `parameters` throwing `schema getter exploded`; `toToolDefinitions` returns a definition and `inspectRuntimeToolInputSchemas` reports `fuzzplugin_move_angles.parameters.type must be "object"`.
Observed result after fix: adapter conversion completed and the focused test file passed, 19 tests.
What was not tested: full repository suite; remote `pnpm check:changed` will be added after PR creation.
